purpose: Thin-copy map of UI routes for external review and redesign planning.
design_intent: Move from a single overgrown dashboard to a page-oriented SaaS layout with a persistent app shell.

current_routes.name: Dashboard
current_routes.risk_note: High coupling due to many concerns in one page.

current_routes.name: Competitor EDA
current_routes.risk_note: Good page boundary; reusable charts can be extracted.

notes: Phase 1 keeps API contracts stable and focuses on UI decomposition.
Navigation labels should map to user decisions, not implementation terms.
